creator: insane@oneinsane.net
text:
Update the port www/webalizer to latest version from webalizer-1.12-09 to 
webalizer-1.20-07. Seems to have fixed some bugs and also repaired the countriespie chart. The site and location is the same new file name is:
webalizer-1.20-07-src.tgz

Fix: 

The same patch files will work on the new version. just need to generate a new 
md5
